controls.name: CloseLine
controls.action: Closes a line to the first point in the sequence. Close a line when a new one is started or when a line ends.

controls.name: JoinToPointNumber
controls.action: Joins to a specified point name

controls.name: HorizontalOffset
controls.action: Starts an offset line at the specified horizontal offset

controls.name: VerticalOffset
controls.action: Starts an offset line at the specified vertical offset

controls.name: StartRectangle
controls.action: Starts a rectangle with an associated point as a corner point and the next point in sequence as an adjacent corner point. Either the width or the point on the opposite side must be specified.

controls.name: StartCircleEdge
controls.action: Starts a circle with an associated point as the first known point on the circle followed by the next two known points.

controls.name: StartCircleCenter
controls.action: Starts a circle with an associated point as the center and a specified radius. If the radius is not specified, the next point in the sequence is taken as a point on the circle.

controls.name: StartLine
controls.action: Starts a new line joining sequence. The previous joining sequence with the same code is ended.
